name: Sony a7C II Mirrorless Camera
description: Building off the sleek profile and full-frame sensor combination of its first-generation predecessor, the black Sony a7C II offers improved resolution, autofocus, in-body image stabilization, and video capabilities in the same compact, all-day, everyday form factor.

features.Key Features:: 33MP Full-Frame Exmor R BSI Sensor | BIONZ XR Image Processor | Shooting Up to 10 fps, ISO 50-204800 | 10-Bit Full-Frame 4K30p Video | S-Log3, S-Gamut3, S-Cinetone, User LUTs | 7 Stops of In-Body Image Stabilization | 759-Point Phase Detection, 94% Coverage | 2.36m-Dot OLED Electronic Viewfinder | 3" 1.03m-Dot Vari-Angle LCD Touchscreen | FE 28-60mm f/4-5.6 Lens
features.Body Only: Sony a7C II Mirrorless Camera | Sony NP-FZ100 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (2280mAh) | Sony ALC-B1EM Body Cap for E-Mount Cameras | Shoulder Strap | Accessory Shoe Cap | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
features.Kit 28-60mm: Sony a7C II Mirrorless Camera | Sony NP-FZ100 Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery (2280mAh) | Sony ALC-B1EM Body Cap for E-Mount Cameras | Shoulder Strap | Accessory Shoe Cap | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Sony FE 28-60mm f/4-5.6 Lens | Sony ALC-F405S 40.5mm Front Lens Cap | Sony ALC-R1EM Rear Lens Cap | Limited 1-Year Warranty
